title: Wennum Ore
description: The mod adds a new super durable ore - Wennum.
body:
This mod adds a new metal called Wennum. Wennum is similar in properties to iron, but slightly better than it, but not better than diamonds. The main feature of tools made of this metal is its enormous strength, it exceeds iron tools by 100 times.

![Durability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a09e82ce5bc6477062e3ab57ef0b614fda06df6b.png)

![Version 1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a592926ce4638d38f82fe42a54e0d28f172ce79.png)

![Upgraded Wennum Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/505dcec72cf8c0caf80178a53127972fedf1841e.png)
